title: Clean Bedrock-Style Cursors
description: Pixel-perfect, Clean Bedrock-Style Cursors for Minecraft Java
body:
[![CurseForge](https://i.imgur.com/eBmLp7F.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mjramon) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/FMq4hOj.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/aegis-architectum) [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/v0q5sfn.png)](https://discord.gg/fWW4Atmr69)

![Pixel-perfect, Clean Bedrock-Style Cursors for Minecraft Java](https://i.imgur.com/gKAwp9V.png)

Minecraft Java resource pack that changes standard cursors to pixel-perfect, clean Bedrock-style cursors.


## REQUIREMENTS
- [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)


## LINKS
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/fWW4Atmr69)
